description.initial: The southeastern waters of the Underwater Realm are quieter than other areas. Ancient statues dot the seafloor, remnants of a civilization that existed before even the merfolk. Their origin is lost to time, but the merfolk maintain them with reverence.
description.return: The southeastern underwater realm. Ancient statues watch from the seafloor.
description.atmospheric: History weighs heavily here. These statues have watched the ocean for millennia.

items.itemMessage: You drink fresh water collected inside a giant shell. Cool and clear.

interactables.name: Seafloor Statues
interactables.examineText: Stone figures stand in rows on the ocean floor, their features worn by time but still recognizable as humanoid. They predate the merfolk civilization by unknown ages.
